title: Security and Data Leak Review for Shamrock Rovers FC
description: Comprehensive security audit reviewing credential exposure, GDPR compliance, FC branding/IP concerns, and third-party service integration security

title: Credential and Secret Exposure Audit
description: Review environment files, docker-compose, credential scripts, and docs/CREDENTIALS-CHECKLIST.md. Identify hardcoded credentials, exposed API keys, weak webhook secrets. Verify AWS Secrets Manager usage.

title: GDPR and Privacy Compliance Review
description: Review database schema, API handlers, auth middleware, and repositories. Check PII handling (emails, phone, names, transaction history), consent management, data retention, right-to-be-forgotten features.

title: Third-Party Integration Security Review
description: Audit webhook verification, integration clients (Stripe, Shopify, GoCardless, Mailchimp, Future Ticketing), webhook handlers, and processors. Check signature verification, replay attack prevention, timing-safe comparisons.

title: FC Branding, IP, and Data Ownership Assessment
description: Review README, docs, and frontend for Shamrock Rovers FC branding, URLs, and business logic exposure. Assess data ownership clauses, IP protection, FC data extractability.

title: Infrastructure and Deployment Security Audit
description: Review AWS CDK stack for RDS security, S3 policies, Lambda IAM roles, API Gateway auth, and secrets management. Check CORS, rate limiting, logging.

title: Frontend Security and Data Exposure Review
description: Audit React app for API keys in client code, console data leaks, localStorage usage, XSS vulnerabilities, and supporter data exposure. Review auth token handling.

title: Documentation and .gitignore Security Review
description: Review .gitignore and all documentation for exposed credentials, test accounts (gleesonb@gmail.com), internal URLs, deployment details, and confidential FC information.
